productDisplayName: Nike Fragrances Men Blue Blue Wave Deo & Perfume
description: Combo nike fragrances Blue Fantasy perfume set for men - contains three products but priced for two! This pack is perfect as a gift or for self indulgence. Celebrate the various avatars the modern cosmopolitan male can take - the athlete, the debonair charmer and the perfect weekend date - with this set. The nike fragrances Blue Wave is a fresh and aromatic fragrance. 150 ml nike fragrances fragrances Blue Wave Spray200 ml Nike Fragrances Fragrances Blue Wave DeodorantCautionFlammableKeep away from sources of ignitionKeep away from childrenDo not use near fire, flame or heatAvoid spraying near the eyes
